items.html:
温度-20℃～40℃
湿度90%RH以下（不结露）
环境远离活性气体、可燃气体、油滴、灰尘。
安装海拔1000m以下：额定功率，1000m以上：每100m降额1.5%，最大4000m
items.translation:
Temperature-20℃～40℃
Humidity90%RH or less(no condensation)
EnvironmentKeep away from active gases, combustible gases, oil droplets, dust.
Installation altitudeBelow 1000m: rated power; above 1000m: derate 1.5% per 100m, max 4000m
